title: jasminum diversifolium var. subhumile
intro: Jasminum diversifolium var. subhumile, also known as the dwarf star jasmine or low-growing star jasmine, is a woody climber with star-shaped flowers that belongs to the family Oleaceae. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The plant's health benefits include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and treat wounds, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Jasminum diversifolium var. subhumile can be used in various herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
